case_title: HURLEY VALLS E VS CITY AND COUNTY OF S F A MUNICIPAL CORP

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY HURLEY VALLS E AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF S F A MUNICIPAL CORP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-13-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF S F A MUNICIPAL CORP
POS ON DEFT. WAS ACTUALLY FILED ON 5-7-91, COMPUTER WOULD NOT ACCEPT THIS DATE.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HURLEY VALLS E RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF S F A MUNICIPAL CORP $1,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,208.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF S F A MUNICIPAL CORP
